# SUWY TECH LLP

**Website:** https://suwytechllp.in
**Description:** Best AI training institute, best DevOps training center, and best software development training center in Kerala.
**Services:** Software Development (Web & Mobile App), Professional Training, Technology Consultancy.

## Training Programs
- Artificial Intelligence (ML, Deep Learning, GenAI)
- AI & Python (Automation, AI workflows)
- DevOps (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS)
- Angular Training (TypeScript, RxJS, Enterprise apps)
- React Course (Hooks, Redux, Next.js)

## Proprietary Products
- **True Match Matrimony:** AI-driven matchmaking platform.
- **SWChits:** Advanced audit-compliant Chitty Management application.

## Leadership
- **Suni Surendran:** Managing Partner (Strategy & Technology Vision)
- **Allwyn Anto:** Managing Partner (Delivery Quality & Engineering)
